_meta.resume_note: The official 2025-2026 ADT, AA, and AS inventories contain no general Biology/Biological Sciences associate degree. The only Biology-titled AS is an allied-health-specific specialization and is outside this pass.

none_found_sources.locator: Complete Associate Degrees for Transfer list; no Biology or Biological Sciences ADT is listed
Complete Associate of Arts Degrees list; no Biology or Biological Sciences AA is listed
Complete Associate of Science Degrees list; the only Biology-titled award is Biological Sciences AS (Emphasis Health Science)
Program description and requirements identify the 65-70 unit award as allied-health and nursing preparation

notes: Biological Sciences Associate of Science (Emphasis Health Science) is excluded as a specialized allied-health pathway: its published core centers on microbiology, anatomy, physiology, psychology, communication, and nursing/health-program prerequisites rather than the general Biology major sequence. Liberal Arts, Emphasis in Mathematics and Science is also not a Biology award.
